name: codex-hermes
description: Experimental Codex plugin for delegating work to Hermes CLI models with an autonomous review loop.

interface.shortDescription: Experimental bridge from Codex tasks to Hermes CLI models.
interface.longDescription: Development-stage Codex plugin for asking a Hermes CLI model for help, then having Codex review the response, run local checks when appropriate, and send focused follow-up review rounds through hermes --resume. The Hermes conversation path works, but slash command discovery is still under investigation.
defaultPrompt: Use /hermes to ask another model to review or solve a task
